---
title: "Introduction and Setup"
author: "ISMB 2026 Multimodal Short Course"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Introduction and Setup

Welcome to the ISMB 2026 Multimodal Short Course. This notebook checks your R/Bioconductor environment and previews the course.

## Setup

```{r load-helpers}
# Load shared helpers (uses the 'here' package to locate the repo root)
source(here::here("R", "utils.R"))
cat("Environment OK. Data dir:", data_path(), "\n")
```

## Content

_Add your material for this module here._

```{r content}
# Your code here
```
